name: structural-character-clearance
description: Verify a settling structural block moves itself clear of an overlapping character without teleporting or pushing the character.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",{layer=1,column=6,row=1}) c:Invoke("HitDepthBlock",{layer=1,column=7,row=1}) task.wait(2.35) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local target=workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Blocks"]:FindFirstChild("DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02") assert(target and target:GetAttribute("StructuralDetached") and target:GetAttribute("StructuralFalling"),"target is not falling") root.CFrame=target.CFrame root.Anchored=true return H:JSONEncode({target=target.Name,root=tostring(root.Position),block=tostring(target.Position)})

steps.label: place the character inside a falling structural block

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local target=workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Blocks"]:FindFirstChild("DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02") local before=root.Position local o=OverlapParams.new() o.FilterType=Enum.RaycastFilterType.Include o.FilterDescendantsInstances={p.Character} local overlap=#workspace:GetPartBoundsInBox(target.CFrame,target.Size+Vector3.new(.2,.2,.2),o) local result={clear=target:GetAttribute("CharacterClearanceResolved"),push=target:GetAttribute("LastCharacterClearancePushStuds"),overlap=overlap,rootAnchored=root.Anchored,drift=(root.Position-before).Magnitude,falling=target:GetAttribute("StructuralFalling"),group=target.CollisionGroup} root.Anchored=false return H:JSONEncode(result)

steps.label: block clears itself and never moves the character
